data.acceptance:
1. `kno ls --limit 20` returns at most 20 knots.
2. `kno ls --limit 20 --offset 40` returns knots 41-60.
3. `kno ls --limit 20 --json` returns a paginated JSON envelope with total, offset, limit, has_more fields.
4. State and type filters are applied at the SQL level before LIMIT.
5. Default behavior (no flags) returns all results as before.
6. All existing tests pass; new tests cover pagination edge cases (empty, partial page, exact page boundary).
7. Performance: paginated queries are measurably faster than full-table loads for repos with 500+ active knots.
